message.content:
@startuml
title client http 2 - server http2

participant "Insomnia-rest-http2" as Client1
participant "Spring-boot-app-http2" as Server1

Client1 ->> Server1 : **1** list employees request
Server1 --> Client1 : **2** list employees response

note over Client1,Server1 #DDDDFF\n| Insomnia-rest-http2 | Spring-boot-app-http2 |\nend note

@enduml
